title: Finder: Your File Manager
drDigitalIntro: Finder is the app that shows you all your files and folders. It's like opening a filing cabinet to see what you've stored. When you open Finder, you'll see the sidebar on the left with shortcuts: Recent files you've used, your Desktop, Documents folder, Downloads folder, Applications (all your programs), and Trash (where deleted files go). The main area shows what's inside each folder.
drDigitalSuccess: Now you know how to navigate your files with Finder!
drDigitalHint: Look at the sidebar in Finder — it shows you the main places where files live on your Mac.
